enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about circumcision, sharing his personal opinion that it robs men of sensory pleasure, that parents shouldn't have the right to perform it on children without consent, and that it should be banned. He discusses its origins as a Jewish identity marker, references the book/movie 'The Red Tent,' and reflects on outdated traditions that persist unquestioned.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: circumcised men are robbed of sexual/sensory pleasure
parents should not have the right to decide this for their child
supports laws to ban the procedure
not a health benefit, only a tradition
we blindly follow old traditions without questioning them
